messages.content:
week 16 notes
- Notification Service: 
  fixed bug where notifications werent being sent to certain users #jent-15202
  enhc: added support for custom notification templates
  update: migrated to new database cluster, seems to be performing better
- Mobile App: 
  feat: implemented new onboarding flow #mob-4321
  chore: removed unused dependencies, reduced app size by 10%
- Auto Job Apply Script: 
  bug: fixed issue where script was applying to same job multiple times #bug-9876
  fix: added error handling for job postings with missing info
  next week: need to work on improving script performance, its still slow
- Jobma Bot: 
  enhc: improved bot's ability to handle user queries, reduced error rate by 20% #jbot-2198
  update: updated bot's training data to include new job categories
  having some issues with bot's conversation flow, need to review and fix
- Payment Gateway: 
  fix: resolved issue with payment processing for international transactions #pay-7562
  chore: updated payment gateway api to latest version, no major changes needed on our end 
challenge: still having issues with Notification Service and Jobma Bot integration, need to figure out why theyre not communicating properly

MMU, Apr 13, 2026 (Apr 06 – Apr 10)

Key Updates

    Notification Service
        - fixed bug where notifications werent being sent to certain users #jent-15202
        - enhc: added support for custom notification templates
        - update: migrated to new database cluster, seems to be performing better

    Mobile App
        - feat: implemented new onboarding flow #mob-4321
        - chore: removed unused dependencies, reduced app size by 10%

    Auto Job Apply Script
        - bug: fixed issue where script was applying to same job multiple times #bug-9876
        - fix: added error handling for job postings with missing info

    Jobma Bot
        - enhc: improved bot's ability to handle user queries, reduced error rate by 20% #jbot-2198
        - update: updated bot's training data to include new job categories

    Payment Gateway
        - fix: resolved issue with payment processing for international transactions #pay-7562
        - chore: updated payment gateway api to latest version, no major changes needed on our end

Key Achievements
    - Fixed bugs in Notification Service and Auto Job Apply Script
    - Improved Jobma Bot's ability to handle user queries
    - Implemented new onboarding flow in Mobile App

Challenges Encountered
    - still having issues with Notification Service and Jobma Bot integration, need to figure out why theyre not communicating properly

Team Challenges
    - None

Key Tasks Scheduled for Next Week
    - need to work on improving Auto Job Apply Script performance, its still slow
    - review and fix Jobma Bot's conversation flow issues

week 17 notes
- Email Service: fixed issue with email templates not rendering properly #jent-15202, enhanced email logging to include more detailed error messages
- React Interview: updated questions to include more scenario-based problems, added new section for testing react hooks #bug-1234, chore: refactored interview solution code to improve readability
- Analytics Dashboard: feat: added new widget for displaying user engagement metrics, update: fixed dashboard layout issue on smaller screens #adh-2345, still having issues with data not loading on first load - need to investigate further
- Email Service: chore: updated dependencies to latest versions, fix: resolved issue with emails not sending due to incorrect SMTP config #jent-15902
next week: revisit analytics dashboard data loading issue and finish react interview questions update
challenge: getting email service to work with new SSL cert is proving to be a pain, need to spend more time on it next week

MMU, Apr 13, 2026 (Apr 06 – Apr 10)

Key Updates

    Email Service
        - fixed issue with email templates not rendering properly #jent-15202
        - enhanced email logging to include more detailed error messages
        - chore: updated dependencies to latest versions
        - fix: resolved issue with emails not sending due to incorrect SMTP config #jent-15902

    React Interview
        - updated questions to include more scenario-based problems
        - added new section for testing react hooks #bug-1234
        - chore: refactored interview solution code to improve readability

    Analytics Dashboard
        - feat: added new widget for displaying user engagement metrics
        - update: fixed dashboard layout issue on smaller screens #adh-2345

Key Achievements
    - Fixed email template rendering issue and enhanced email logging
    - Updated React Interview questions and improved code readability
    - Added new widget to Analytics Dashboard for user engagement metrics

Challenges Encountered
    - getting email service to work with new SSL cert is proving to be a pain

Team Challenges
    - None

Key Tasks Scheduled for Next Week
    - revisit analytics dashboard data loading issue
    - finish react interview questions update 
    - resolve email service issue with new SSL cert

MMU, Apr 13, 2026 (Apr 06 – Apr 10)
Key Updates
    React Interview
    	Changes added for the notification and email for ID verification
    	fix: #jent-15202, 15225, 15226, 15146, 15158, 15149, 15058
	    Fixed few more sentry issues
	    enhancement - #jent-15125, implemented proctoring timeline for practice question in interview
 
    Integration
    	Created sandbox and checked feasibility of copyleaks integration
    	Checked feasibility and multiple scenarios for originality.ai
    	Client questions related to jobma api and webhooks
 
    Live Interview
       fix: jent-15166, 15186
	    enhc: created v2 branch for new design, using version tag in ci, docker and sentry
	    chore: setup husky to remind to bump version tag & run tests before push
	    fix: replaced NODE_ENV usage with NEXT_PUBLIC_ENV
	    enhc: using single env and docker compose files
	    enhc: reduced deployment times and docker image size
	    chore: changes regarding above commit in ci cd
	    chore: updated packages, using node 24 in ci
	    chore: getting trusted urls from env now.
	    chore: removed type checking for application settings
	    chore: removed source attribute and related logic
	    chore: removed job related logic (UNDP)
 
    Interview API
		update: #jent- 15230: Added Failed email and notification for ID verification
 
 
    Candidate Recommendation
		update: APIs for compatibility with the PHP side requirements
		update: cr_crons for the new table requirements.
		fix: profile pic and applied id in the CR APIs
 
    Jobma bot
		Bug: #jent-15232(Dislike feedback submitted without mandatory comment on first attempt)
		Added more intents for 'get interview details'
 
    Auto Job Apply Script:
		feat: Tested the auto job apply script and analyzed results for performance and accuracy.
		enhc: Evaluated script performance with a 4-hour run 
		enhc: Continued improvements in LinkedIn profile extraction and bug fixes.
		enhc: Performed R&D for supporting additional job portals.
		feat: Integrated global job pool save API.
		chore: Conducted project demo and walkthrough.
		fix: fixed issues with low/empty LinkedIn profile data.
    MISC
		Did research for deep fake detection in the videos.
		Implemented a basic code of Mediasoup as an alternative to Janus to understand the load.
		fix: #jent-14052, AI score mismatch due to excel questions
		Fix failure email functionality for the live interview summary
		Candidate support issues
		Create configurable env used for all scripts
		Interview - Saurav: Rejected
		Resolve video worker exception
		Regenerate proctoring for candidates 
		Create Doc for feature - Applicant source tracking
 
    Key Achievements
        Fixed several issues
 
    Challenges Encountered
		    None
 
    Team Challenges
		    None
 
    Key Tasks Scheduled for Next Week
		update live interview's design.
		feat: UI changes for theme.
		feat: Integrate get jobs from job pool API.
		Integration API - Add more coverage.
		Fix: Search in candidate recommendation.

MMU, Apr 13, 2026 (Apr 06 – Apr 10)

Key Updates

    React Interview
        - Changes added for the notification and email for ID verification
        - fix: #jent-15202, 15225, 15226, 15146, 15158, 15149, 15058
        - Fixed few more sentry issues
        - enhancement - #jent-15125, implemented proctoring timeline for practice question in interview

    Integration
        - Created sandbox and checked feasibility of copyleaks integration
        - Checked feasibility and multiple scenarios for originality.ai
        - Client questions related to jobma api and webhooks

    Live Interview
        - fix: jent-15166, 15186
        - enhc: created v2 branch for new design, using version tag in ci, docker and sentry
        - chore: setup husky to remind to bump version tag & run tests before push
        - fix: replaced NODE_ENV usage with NEXT_PUBLIC_ENV
        - enhc: using single env and docker compose files
        - enhc: reduced deployment times and docker image size
        - chore: changes regarding above commit in ci cd
        - chore: updated packages, using node 24 in ci
        - chore: getting trusted urls from env now.
        - chore: removed type checking for application settings
        - chore: removed source attribute and related logic
        - chore: removed job related logic (UNDP)

    Interview API
        - update: #jent- 15230: Added Failed email and notification for ID verification

    Candidate Recommendation
        - update: APIs for compatibility with the PHP side requirements
        - update: cr_crons for the new table requirements.
        - fix: profile pic and applied id in the CR APIs

    Jobma bot
        - Bug: #jent-15232(Dislike feedback submitted without mandatory comment on first attempt)
        - Added more intents for 'get interview details'

    Auto Job Apply Script:
        - feat: Tested the auto job apply script and analyzed results for performance and accuracy.
        - enhc: Evaluated script performance with a 4-hour run 
        - enhc: Continued improvements in LinkedIn profile extraction and bug fixes.
        - enhc: Performed R&D for supporting additional job portals.
        - feat: Integrated global job pool save API.
        - chore: Conducted project demo and walkthrough.
        - fix: fixed issues with low/empty LinkedIn profile data.

    MISC
        - Did research for deep fake detection in the videos.
        - Implemented a basic code of Mediasoup as an alternative to Janus to understand the load.
        - fix: #jent-14052, AI score mismatch due to excel questions
        - Fix failure email functionality for the live interview summary
        - Candidate support issues
        - Create configurable env used for all scripts
        - Interview - Saurav: Rejected
        - Resolve video worker exception
        - Regenerate proctoring for candidates 
        - Create Doc for feature - Applicant source tracking

Key Achievements
    - Fixed several issues

Challenges Encountered
    - None

Team Challenges
    - None

Key Tasks Scheduled for Next Week
    - update live interview's design.
    - feat: UI changes for theme.
    - feat: Integrate get jobs from job pool API.
    - Integration API - Add more coverage.
    - Fix: Search in candidate recommendation.

week 12 notes
- Search Engine: 
  * fixed #jent-15202 - query params not being encoded correctly
  * enhc: added support for boolean search queries
  * update: dependencies for search lib - now using 3.2.1
- Authentication: 
  * feat: implemented passwordless login with magic links #auth-234
  * chore: cleaned up some unused code in auth controller
  * bug: #bug-1234 - login not working on safari - still not fixed
- Analytics Dashboard: 
  * update: new dashboard design - still in review
  * fixed #ad-1567 - wrong data being displayed on user engagement chart
- Auto Job Apply Script: 
  * feat: added support for applying to jobs on linkedin #jobs-145
  * enhc: improved script performance by 30% 
next week: finish #jent-15202 follow up tasks, review analytics dashboard design 
challenges: getting auth to work on older browsers, safari login issue still open

MMU, Apr 13, 2026 (Apr 06 – Apr 10)

Key Updates

    Search Engine
        - fixed #jent-15202 - query params not being encoded correctly
        - enhc: added support for boolean search queries
        - update: dependencies for search lib - now using 3.2.1

    Authentication
        - feat: implemented passwordless login with magic links #auth-234
        - chore: cleaned up some unused code in auth controller
        - bug: #bug-1234 - login not working on safari - still not fixed

    Analytics Dashboard
        - update: new dashboard design - still in review
        - fixed #ad-1567 - wrong data being displayed on user engagement chart

    Auto Job Apply Script
        - feat: added support for applying to jobs on linkedin #jobs-145
        - enhc: improved script performance by 30%

Key Achievements
    - Implemented passwordless login with magic links
    - Improved Auto Job Apply Script performance by 30%
    - Fixed query params encoding issue in Search Engine

Challenges Encountered
    - Getting auth to work on older browsers
    - Safari login issue still open (#bug-1234)

Team Challenges
    - None

Key Tasks Scheduled for Next Week
    - Finish #jent-15202 follow up tasks
    - Review analytics dashboard design

week 7 notes
Payment Gateway:
- fixed #jent-15202, stupid bug where payments were being processed twice
- enhc: added support for paypal in #pay-145
- update: refactored the payment processing func to make it more readable

Interview API:
- feat: implemented new endpoint for retrieving interview questions #int-201
- chore: updated dependencies to latest version
- bug: #bug-1234, still having issues with interview scheduling, need to look into it more

Admin Dashboard:
- fix: #ad-109, dashboard not loading for some admins, turned out to be a caching issue
- enhc: added new charts for user engagement metrics #ad-156

next week:
- finish implementing interview scheduling fix
- start working on payment gateway testing

had some issues with the payment gateway this week, 
the doubles payments bug was a nightmare to track down 
but at least its fixed now

    Interview API
        - feat: implemented new endpoint for retrieving interview questions #int-201
        - chore: updated dependencies to latest version
        - bug: #bug-1234, still having issues with interview scheduling, need to look into it more

        - enhc: added new charts for user engagement metrics #ad-156
